$comment: phase 4.7 (characterization) golden snapshot — UC-USER-SIGNUP-001 (PoC #03 NestJS retrofit / corroboration #2 / 2026-05-07). PoC #06 형식 정합 검증 — Modern 스택에서도 동일 schema 동작.
data_source_status: 실 DB 환경 부재 — TypeORM + RealWorld example 코드 분석 기반

scenarios.name: happy path — 신규 user 등록 (username + email + password)

given.TB_USER_state: (empty / no existing user with same username or email)

scenarios.when: POST /api/users → ValidationPipe → UserController.create → UserService.create → BeforeInsert hashPassword → INSERT user

scenarios.name: duplicate username — App pre-check 차단

expected_response_400._message: 'Username and email must be unique.' — UserService.create:47 createQueryBuilder pre-check

behavior_likely_bug: DB UQ 부재 (AP-DB-001) — App pre-check 만으로는 race window 존재. 새 시스템 = TypeORM @Index({unique: true}) + catch QueryFailedError → 409 Conflict 의무

scenarios.name: likely bug — invalid email format
behavior_likely_bug: AP-VALIDATION-001 (F-143) — UserService.update 시 validate(newUser) 미호출 → email 형식 검증 우회. 새 시스템 update 도 @IsEmail 검증 의무

phase_4_7_corroboration_role.$comment: ≥2 PoC corroboration 위한 PoC #03 phase 4.7 retrofit. snapshot schema 가 PoC #06 (Legacy / Spring 4.1) + PoC #03 (Modern / NestJS) 두 spectrum 에서 동작 입증.
phase_4_7_corroboration_role.schema_compatibility: ✅ 100% — given/when/then + intent_classification + behavior_to_preserve + behavior_likely_bug 필드 모두 정합
phase_4_7_corroboration_role.format_validation: Given/When/Then BDD 스타일 (F-PHASE7-003) + Gherkin acceptance-criteria.json 정합 (chain 2)
phase_4_7_corroboration_role.stack_spectrum: Modern NestJS — PoC #06 Legacy Spring 4.1 + iBATIS 와 다른 spectrum
